embeds.title: 【Morimens】Blessor 3 Turns Speed Clear | Arc 2 H2-9 w/ Pollux Th...
embeds.description: hello! i recently got Pollux to maxxed and Clementine OE and wanted to try them against Blessor. I didn't record my first try since I didn't expect myself to speed clear it, so I did it again (just to prove it wasn't a fluke~) still, the first clear's replay's record is in the comments if you think
